PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?drug ?drugLabel ?brand ?brandLabel ?sideEffect ?sideEffectLabel WHERE {
  ?drug wdt:P31 wd:Q220459 ; wdt:P2576 wd:Q19401488 .
  ?drug rdfs:label ?drugLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?drugLabel) = 'en')
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug wdt:P2046 ?brand .
    ?brand rdfs:label ?brandLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?brandLabel) = 'en')
    .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug wdt:P2027 ?sideEffect .
    ?sideEffect rdfs:label ?sideEffectLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?sideEffectLabel) = 'en')
    .
  }
}
LIMIT 50
